name: Dynamix Corp
summary: PART I General We are a blank check company incorporated in the Cayman Islands (the Company) on June 13, 2024 formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, amalgamation, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses (the initial business combination). We have identified a target for our business combination, as described below under Proposed Business Combination. If the proposed Business Combination is not completed,...
